campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026, adopted a policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement activities, and discussed efforts to fill open city positions and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment transactions for March 2026
New city policy prohibiting federal civil enforcement on city-owned property
Open city positions and recruitment and retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address plans for cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the County, and residents had the chance to voice objections. The council also adopted new policies on technology disruption and created a formal process for residents to request accommodations from the city.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup and abatement orders
New Technology Disruption Policy for the city
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. Key decisions included accepting a donation of emergency medical equipment, approving a paving contract, and submitting grant applications for a statewide project.
keyTopics: Approved O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized grant applications for statewide project
Adopted list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on preparing the June 2 agenda and discussed updates to neighborhood services and government rules committees.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning and new items
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan updates
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed agendas and reports from various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Board and commission agenda reviews

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct city business and recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included a flag salute and approval of previous meeting minutes.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which guides development and safety planning through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, parks, and infrastructure during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update for the 2015-2040 General Plan
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation)
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss planning and development issues related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Public participation available in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings and votes on May 19, 2026, including approval of a new city manager and amendments to local land development rules. The council considered new ordinances related to city regulations and approved a site development permit amendment for a property project.
keyTopics: Appointment of permanent City Manager
New ordinance proposals affecting city regulations
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Public assessment hearing and confirmation

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles and strategies for electrification programs that would help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to reduce gas dependency
Proposed principles for assisting homeowners with the switch to electric systems
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Status update on city electrification efforts
